heading: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Find answers to common questions about GoBus.

items.q: How do I book a trip?
items.a: Search for your route on the Search page, pick a schedule that suits you, choose your seats, and confirm the booking. You'll receive a confirmation with your ticket details.
Yes. Go to My Trips, open the booking you want to cancel, and tap Cancel. Cancellations made more than 24 hours before departure are fully refunded.
We accept major credit and debit cards. Payment is processed securely at the time of booking.

items.q: How early should I arrive at the station?
items.a: We recommend arriving at least 15 minutes before the scheduled departure to allow time for boarding.

items.q: Can I track my bus in real time?
items.a: Yes. Once your trip is active, open it from My Trips to see the live position of your bus on the map.
Each passenger may bring one carry-on bag and one piece of checked luggage (max 20 kg). Oversized items should be arranged with the operator in advance.

items.q: How do I create an account?
items.a: Tap Register in the top navigation, fill in your details, and verify your email address. You can then log in and start booking trips.
Use the Forgot Password link on the login page. We'll send a reset link to your registered email address.
Send us an email at support@gobus.ro and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

contact.title: Still need help?
contact.description: Our support team is here for you.
